title: Sunday in August
writer: Sergio Amidei, Franco Brusati, Luciano Emmer
actors: Anna Baldini, Vera Carmi, Emilio Cigoli
plot: A variety of different people, both adults, children, families, young lovers and youth gangs, spend a Sunday at the beach of Ostia outside Rome.
awards: Nominated for 1 BAFTA Award2 wins & 1 nomination total
